description: Recto: Informal note in Judaeo-Arabic from Bū l-Majd to al-Raṣuy asking him to send the jarāʾid(?) belonging to the compound, urgently. Dating: early 13th century. Verso: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: פתק בלתי-פורמלי מאת בו אל-מג'ד; בצד ב חשבונות.
